name: @bpmn-react/anchor-git
description: Git anchor adapter (Handoff 8): anchors the ledger chain head to a commit via a HOST-injected transport (the library never does network or shells out to git). Implements the AnchorAdapter contract from @bpmn-react/identity. Zero runtime dependencies. Workspace-only — the publish scope awaits pendencias.md §1.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ../../scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs dist/cjs
